## [03:00 - 06:01]

with launching businesses, with being an entrepreneur. So there's often many shifts that go through here that, and you will probably experience that. So the business launch formula very briefly is this idea where you have a list, or you start to build a list, which is that's how I started out in the very early days, I started building a list, and I started with, just like everyone else, I started with zero subscribers. And then I gradually, very, very, very slowly grew from there, but then I had a list, and then you do a launch. The reality is you won't just do one launch, you'll do many launches, and they'll all be slightly different, and they might be radically different. You might be doing seed launches, internal launches, JV launches, quick launches, all kinds of different launches, but the idea is as you have this list, when you do that launch, you get amazing knowledge.
